Package com.pax.poslink

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    AbstractPosLink.ReportStatusListener
    Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractPosLink
    The parent of PosLink.
    AddlRspData
    Response AddlRspData
    BASE64Encoder
    Base64 Encoder utility.
    BatchRequest
    To set batch transaction request properties
    BatchResponse
    Batch transaction response properties
    CommSetting
    Set the communication method with POS terminal
    ExternalClass
    To register an external class for supporting POSLink on different platform, For example, register UART jar on casio device to support serial port, This class is for loading some externalclassesfor some specific platforms.
    HostCredentialInfo
    Response Host Credential Information
    LogSetting
    To set log configuration
    ManageRequest
    To set manage transaction request properties.
    For each command, it has its own supported parameters.
    ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS  
    ManageRequest.CustomMACInformation  
    ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap  
    ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService  
    ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService  
    ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUpdate  
    ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUsage  
    ManageResponse
    Management transaction response properties
    ManageResponse.CustomMACInfo  
    ManageResponse.DeviceInfo  
    ManageResponse.DUKPTKeyInfo  
    ManageResponse.GetPEDInfoResponse  
    ManageResponse.MasterSessionKeyInfo  
    MerchantTotals
    Totals for each MID and TID combination.
    MultipleCommandsRequest
    To execute multiple commands at a time.
    MultipleCommandsResponse
    To get the results of multiple commands.
    PayloadRequest
    To set payload transaction request properties
    PayloadResponse
    Payload transaction response properties
    PaymentRequest
    To set payment transaction request properties
    PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo  
    PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo.ExtraChargeItem  
    PaymentRequest.CommercialCard  
    PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail  
    PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail  
    PaymentRequest.HostCredentialInformation  
    PaymentRequest.HostGateWay  
    PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo  
    PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.LodgingItem
    LodgingItem class.
    PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.RoomRates
    RoomRates class.
    PaymentRequest.Original  
    PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior  
    PaymentResponse
    Payment transaction response properties
    PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag  
    PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo  
    PaymentResponse.TaxDetail  
    PosLink
    This class implement communication with POS terminal which comply with "PAX_Interface_Between_ECR_PC_and_Terminal".
    ProcessTransResult
    This class supply property Code and Msg for POSLink.ProcessTrans
    ReportRequest
    To set report transaction request properties
    ReportResponse
    Report transaction response properties
    ReportResponse.ReportEmvTag
    Details in EmvTag
    ReportResponse.ReportTransInfo
    Details in TransInfo
    TORResponseInfo
    Response TOR Information
    TotalTax
    Totals amount of tax for each tax type.
    VASResponseInfo
    Response VAS Information
    WebService
    This class implements communication with a Web server for getting the device IP address.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    ExternalClass.CLASSTYPE
    indicate the Class type
    LogSetting.LOGLEVEL
    indicate the log level
    ProcessTransResult.ProcessTransResultCode
    indicate the process result
    WebService.METHOD
    indicate the HTTP method
